title: Theatre listing documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.
examination.rationale: Supports documented assessment, suitability, investigations, consent and individualized care plan for theatre listing documentation; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Procedure and indication, surgeon, priority, laterality, equipment, implant, anesthesia, comorbidity, tests, blood, admission type, scheduling, authorization and final listing decision remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for theatre listing documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
